title: Head of Developer Relations
research_hook: Sarah recently spoke at KubeCon about scaling developer communities beyond 1M users. She emphasized the challenge of measuring community-driven adoption vs. top-down sales.
kb_context: OpenClaw is a self-hosted, local-first personal AI assistant platform. Multi-channel (WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, voice), multi-model (Anthropic, Google, OpenAI, local), multi-agent with cron automation. Available at openclaw.ai.
competitive_context: Grafana currently uses manual processes for community triage and content creation. No known AI-assisted DevRel tooling in place.

title: VP Developer Experience
research_hook: Marcus posted on X about hiring 3 DevRel engineers this quarter to keep up with docs and community support demand.
kb_context: OpenClaw automate community management, social listening, content creation, and competitive intelligence. 10 specialized agents replace a full DevRel + Sales team.
competitive_context: Supabase is scaling rapidly and struggling to keep docs current. They're spending heavily on DevRel headcount.

title: Director of Developer Relations
research_hook: Aisha wrote a blog post about the ROI challenge of DevRel — how to prove developer advocacy drives revenue when the funnel is indirect.
kb_context: OpenClaw automate community management, social listening, content creation, and competitive intelligence. The system tracks engagement metrics across GitHub, social media, and community forums.
competitive_context: Neon competes with PlanetScale and CockroachDB. Their DevRel team is small (3 people) relative to competitors.

title: Developer Relations Manager
research_hook: Tom's team manages 200+ GitHub issues per week and recently complained on a podcast about the triage bottleneck slowing feature prioritization.
kb_context: OpenClaw include Sage (community manager) which auto-triages GitHub issues with sentiment analysis, churn risk detection, and priority scoring. Handles 200+ issues/week automatically.
competitive_context: Datadog has a large DevRel team but still struggles with volume. They use basic label automation but no AI-powered triage.

title: Head of Community
kb_context: OpenClaw automate community management, social listening, content creation, and competitive intelligence. 10 specialized agents replace a full DevRel + Sales team.
competitive_context: Vercel has a massive community but relies heavily on manual moderation and content curation.
